reviews.review_description:
Great to see this come from steam to the Quest.
Please add controller free hand tracking to the game ; seems like a no-brainer.
Pass through support would also be nice .￼

reviews.review_title: A few more features then perfect
reviews.review_description:
A good little fitness app, would benefit from mixed reality, so you can move and punch  without worrying you might hit an object.

Is the punch dodge combo working, odd side effects and no bar ever comes round to dodge.

Future improvements could easily get 5 stars.

Update: Dev was very responsive and the main issue was fixed. There are times where the bar ducking goes on until end of round, linger than I expect it should 

Please consider MR modes, thanks.

Hope the devs continue to work and update this title (different coaches, longer rounds, changing bag/glove colors)

Also adding slips, blocks, and posts to the coach mode would be great too.

Overall I’m happy with what you get for the price!!
